[PDF] Patterns of Sexual, Intimate Partner, and Stalking Polyvictimization Exposure Across Racial and Ethnic Populations in the US: Findings from the National Intimate …

L Fedina, BL Backes, K Toohy, ND Franke, M Royer… - Victims & Offenders, 2026
Few studies have assessed sexual, intimate partner, and stalking polyvictimization in
adult populations, including the use of nationally representative adult samples large
enough to detect potential differences in victimization by sex, race, and ethnicity. This …

 

This message was sent by Google Scholar because you're following new articles written by Bethany L Backes.
